title: Parallax per-slice arbiter receipt (v0.37 P0.2)
description: Committed at .parallax/<slug>/arbiter/<slice_id>.json by the independent whole-seeing arbiter when it drove a slice's assembled tracks to green. It is a FRESH, per-slice receipt the standalone finalize gate (scripts/finalize-gate.py) requires for every integrated slice, so the orchestrator cannot self-green a slice or fold arbitration inline. The receipt binds the green verdict to the exact assembled diff the arbiter saw (verified_diff) and to the slice identity. The receipt proves an arbiter verdict was recorded; that the arbiter was a genuinely independent dispatch is a prompt-contract obligation the harness cannot prove mechanically.

arbiter.description: Identifier of the independent arbiter dispatch that produced this verdict (agent_type/agent_id or session ref).

verdict.description: Only a green arbiter verdict is a valid integration receipt; a non-green slice is not integrated.

verified_diff.description: Hash/sha of the assembled diff the arbiter ran the tests against — binds the green to a concrete tree, matching run-state.slices[].verified_diff.

at.description: ISO timestamp the arbiter recorded the verdict.
